name: Moo Goo Gaipan #3
recipeInstructions:
---------------------DREDGING MIXTURE---------------------
2 tablespoons Cornstarch
1/2 teaspoon Salt
1/4 teaspoon Pepper
-------------------------THICKENER-------------------------
2 tablespoons Sherry
3 tablespoons Chicken broth
2 tablespoons Cornstarch
---------------------OTHER INGREDIENTS---------------------
4 ounces Mushrooms, sliced
4 ounces Pea pods, strings removed
1 Clove Garlic, minced
2 to 3 slices Ginger root, minced
2 tablespoons Oil
Skin & bone chicken, then dice. Combine Dredge ingredients,
dredge chicken in mixture to coat. Mix sherry, chicken broth
and cornstarch to form paste. Heat oil in Wok (or frying pan).
Add garlic and ginger, stir-fry a few times. Add chicken,
stir-fry 1 minute. Add mushrooms and pea pods, stir-fry
2 - 3 minutes. Add sherry/broth/cornstarch paste to thicken.
Serve with rice. (A 4 ounce can of button mushrooms can be used
instead of the fresh. Use liquid in place of chicken broth).
